title: Two down, one to go - who will join Burnley & Wolves?
summary: With Wolves and Burnley now relegated from the Premier League, BBC Sport examines which side is most likely to join them in the Championship next season. The question focuses on the tight battle at the bottom of the table.
content: With Wolves and Burnley now relegated, BBC Sport looks at which side is most likely to join them in the Championship next season.

content: It took just five minutes for chants of "we are top of the league" to ring out around Turf Moor, as the title pendulum continues to shift towards Manchester City.

title: Farke delighted with hard-fought point at Bournemouth
summary: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke praised his team's mental resilience after securing a draw at Bournemouth with a 97th-minute equalizer. The point keeps Leeds' survival hopes alive in their battle against relegation.
content: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke is full of praise for the "mentality" of his side as Sean Longstaff's 97th-minute goal earned his side a "hard-fought" point away at Bournemouth.

title: Iraola frustrated after Leeds' equaliser was not ruled out for offside
summary: Bournemouth boss Andoni Iraola expressed frustration with the VAR decision to allow Leeds' 97th-minute equalizer, arguing a player was in an offside position. The controversial call denied Bournemouth what they believed should have been a victory.
content: Bournemouth boss Andoni Iraola is frustrated with the decision to not rule out Sean Longstaff's 97th-minute equaliser for Leeds as a player was "offside in front of his goalkeeper".

title: Burnley must come back stronger after 'relentless' season - Parker

content: Burnley head coach Scott Parker says his side must "come back stronger" after their 1-0 defeat to Manchester City meant they were relegated from the Premier League.

title: Hearts' McEntee & Magnusson to miss rest of season
summary: Hearts manager Derek McInnes confirmed that defenders Oisin McEntee and Tomas Magnusson will be sidelined for the remainder of the season. The team must manage without these key players for their remaining matches. This significant injury blow could impact Hearts' performance in the closing stages of the season.
content: Manager Derek McInnes says Hearts must "deal with" losing Oisin McEntee and Tomas Magnusson for the rest of the season.

zh.title: 哈茨队的麦肯蒂和马格努松将缺阵赛季剩余比赛
zh.summary: 哈茨队主教练德里克·麦金尼斯确认后卫奥辛·麦肯蒂和托马斯·马格努松将在赛季剩余时间内无法上场。球队必须在没有这些关键球员的情况下完成剩余比赛。这一重大伤病打击可能会影响哈茨队在赛季最后阶段的表现。

title: Leicester fans demand change as Rowett urges action after relegation
summary: Leicester City has been relegated to League One following their loss of Premier League status. Fans are calling for substantial changes at the club, while manager Gary Rowett emphasizes the need for decisive action. The club faces a critical period as it attempts to recover from this setback.
content: Leicester City fans demand change at the club after relegation to League One, while manager Gary Rowett says "decisive action" is needed.

zh.title: 莱斯特城球迷呼吁变革，罗维特敦促采取行动应对降级
zh.summary: 莱斯特城因失去英超联赛资格而被降级到英乙。球迷要求俱乐部进行重大变革，而主帅加里·罗维特强调需要采取坚决的行动。该俱乐部正面临关键时期，试图从这一挫折中恢复。

title: If the Premier League did an NFL-style draft, who would each team select?
summary: In a creative exercise inspired by NFL draft week, analysts have imagined how Premier League clubs would select players in a hypothetical draft format. The piece explores the drama and intrigue that would come with such a selection process. It offers an entertaining thought experiment on player acquisition.
content: In the spirit of NFL draft week, we created a Premier League version with all the drama and intrigue of the real thing.

zh.title: 如果英超进行NFL风格选秀，每支球队会选择谁？
zh.summary: 在受NFL选秀周启发的创意练习中，分析师们想象了英超俱乐部如何在假设的选秀形式中选择球员。该文章探讨了这样的选择过程会带来的戏剧性和吸引力。它提供了一个关于球员获得的有趣思想实验。

title: The mental toll of injury nightmares that threaten players' World Cup dreams
summary: With the World Cup approximately two months away, numerous players are racing against time to recover from injuries. The injuries pose a serious threat to players' participation in the tournament. The piece examines the psychological pressures athletes face when injuries jeopardize career opportunities.
content: With the World Cup less than two months away, many players are in a race against time to recover from injury for soccer's showpiece event.

zh.title: 威胁球员世界杯梦想的伤病噩梦的心理代价
zh.summary: 距离世界杯仅约两个月，众多球员与时间赛跑以恢复伤势。这些伤病对球员的参赛资格构成了严重威胁。该文章探讨了当伤病危害职业机会时，运动员面临的心理压力。

title: Football quiz: Name every winner of Championship
summary: Following Coventry City's Championship title win, securing their Premier League promotion, a quiz challenges readers to name all Championship winners from the past 22 seasons. The quiz tests knowledge of England's second-tier football history. Coventry's success marks a significant moment in the competition's recent history.
content: Premier League-bound Coventry City have secured the Championship title. Can you name every winner from the past 22 seasons?

zh.title: 足球竞猜：说出所有英冠联赛冠军
zh.summary: 在考文垂城队赢得英冠联赛冠军并获得英超升级资格之后，一个竞猜题目要求读者命名过去22个赛季的所有英冠联赛冠军。这个竞猜测试了对英格兰第二级足球历史的了解。考文垂的成功标志着该联赛最近历史上的一个重要时刻。

title: Rangers captain Tavernier to leave in summer after 11 years
summary: Rangers captain James Tavernier has announced his departure from the Scottish club at the end of the season. Tavernier has been a mainstay at Ibrox for 11 years, making him a key figure in the club's recent history. His exit marks the end of an era for both the captain and the Rangers organization.
content: Captain James Tavernier announces he will leave Rangers at the end of the season, after 11 years at Ibrox.

zh.title: 流浪者队队长塔弗尼尔在效力11年后将在夏天离队
zh.summary: 流浪者队队长詹姆斯·塔弗尼尔宣布将在赛季末离开这家苏格兰俱乐部。塔弗尼尔在艾布罗克斯效力11年，是俱乐部近期历史上的关键人物。他的离队标志着队长和流浪者队组织时代的结束。

title: Will Romero play for Tottenham again? Are Spurs better off in relegation fight without their captain?
summary: Tottenham faces uncertainty regarding captain Cristian Romero's future after he suffered a season-ending knee injury. The article examines whether Romero will play again for Spurs and whether the team can maintain their battle for Premier League survival without him. His absence during a crucial period raises questions about recovery and team chances.
content: Following his season-ending knee injury, has Cristian Romero played his last game for Spurs? Will they secure Premier League survival in his absence?

zh.title: 罗梅罗还会为托特纳姆效力吗？热刺队在没有队长的情况下在降级之战中会更好吗?
zh.summary: 托特纳姆在队长克里斯蒂安·罗梅罗因赛季末膝盖受伤后面临不确定性。这篇文章探讨了罗梅罗是否会再为热刺效力，以及球队在没有他的情况下是否能保持对英超联赛生存权的争夺。他在关键时期的缺席引发了关于康复和球队前景的问题。

title: Spain defender Batlle close to agreeing Arsenal move
summary: Spanish defender Ona Batlle is nearing a deal to join Arsenal as a free agent in the upcoming transfer window. The transfer would represent a significant acquisition for Arsenal's defense. Batlle's move comes at a time when the club is actively strengthening its squad.
content: Spain defender Ona Batlle is close to agreeing a move to Arsenal as a free agent in the summer.

zh.title: 西班牙后卫巴特尔接近同意转会阿森纳
zh.summary: 西班牙后卫奥纳·巴特尔即将以自由球员身份在即将到来的转会窗口加入阿森纳。这笔转会将成为阿森纳防线的一笔重要补强。巴特尔的转会恰逢该俱乐部积极加强阵容之时。

title: Fernandes would win Ballon d'Or at Man City - Pogba
summary: Paul Pogba has stated that Bruno Fernandes, Manchester United's captain, would be in contention for the Ballon d'Or if he played for Manchester City. Pogba's claim reflects the belief that individual player awards are influenced by team success and recognition. The statement opens discussions about how much context matters in evaluating individual player performance.
content: Paul Pogba believes Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes would be in contention to win the Ballon d'Or if he played for a team like Manchester City.

zh.title: 波格巴称费尔南德斯在曼城会赢得金球奖
zh.summary: 保罗·博格巴表示，曼联队长布鲁诺·费尔南德斯如果效力于曼城，将有可能争夺金球奖。博格巴的言论反映了一种信念，即个人球员奖项受到球队成功和认可度的影响。这一声明引发了关于在评估个人球员表现时背景有多重要的讨论。

title: Real Madrid's Tchouameni on Man Utd radar
summary: Manchester United is monitoring Real Madrid's Aurelien Tchouameni as they seek to strengthen their central midfield during the summer transfer window. Tchouameni is identified as a priority target for the club's recruitment. The interest highlights United's ambitions to bolster their squad in a key position.
content: Real Madrid's Aurelien Tchouameni is one of the players Man Utd are looking at to fill their priority central midfield position this summer.

zh.title: 切克蒙尼在曼联的关注清单上
zh.summary: 曼联在寻求加强中场防线时正在关注皇马的奥雷利安·切克蒙尼。切克蒙尼被确定为俱乐部招募的优先目标。这一兴趣突显了曼联在关键位置加强阵容的雄心。

title: Lingard becomes first British scorer in Brazilian cup
summary: Former England international Jesse Lingard makes historical significance by becoming the first British player to score in Brazil's domestic cup competition while representing Corinthians. The milestone highlights the growing presence of British players in Brazilian football.
content: Former England forward Jesse Lingard becomes the first British player to score in Brazil's domestic cup, according to his club Corinthians.

zh.title: 林加德成为巴西杯首位英国进球者
zh.summary: 前英格兰国脚杰西·林加德在代表科林蒂安队时，成为首位在巴西国内杯赛中进球的英国球员，具有历史意义。这一里程碑突显了越来越多的英国球员在巴西足球中的活跃。

title: McTominay & Gilmour on Scotland's World Cup hopes
summary: Scotland's Scott McTominay and Billy Gilmour, both currently at Napoli, are targeting a historic World Cup appearance for their national team this summer. The duo aims to deliver a long-awaited first tournament qualification for Scotland at football's biggest stage.
content: Napoli duo Scott McTominay and Billy Gilmour target a first for Scotland at a World Cup this summer.

zh.title: 麦克托米奈和吉尔莫尔谈苏格兰的世界杯希望

title: Chelsea to play all WSL games at Stamford Bridge
summary: Chelsea is consolidating all Women's Super League matches at Stamford Bridge, signaling the club's ambition to establish itself as the world's preeminent women's sports organization. The strategic move reflects Chelsea's investment in elevating the profile and reach of women's football.
content: Chelsea say switching all their women's games to Stamford Bridge reaffirms an "ambition and intent" to become "the biggest women's sports club in the world".

zh.title: 切尔西所有女超联赛比赛将在斯坦福桥进行

title: Celtic's Engels attracts Lazio interest - gossip
summary: Celtic midfielder Engels is attracting interest from Serie A club Lazio as the transfer window heats up, while Rangers is being urged to strengthen its goalkeeping position. The gossip highlights activity in the Scottish transfer market ahead of the new season.

title: 'Most enjoyable season since Wright years' - how Saints stormed to title
summary: St Johnstone won the Scottish Championship title and secured immediate return to the Premiership after an emphatic campaign. This represents their most enjoyable season since the Wright era.

title: 50 days until World Cup - pick your favourite kits

zh.title: 距离世界杯还有50天 - 选择你最喜欢的球衣
zh.summary: BBC体育展示了今年夏天世界杯上出现的最具视觉吸引力的球衣。读者可以在赛前为他们最喜欢的设计投票。

title: 'Turning football into rubble': Chaos reigns in ACL after VAR intervenes over substitution
summary: In an unprecedented moment, VAR overturned a goal over a substitution error in an Asian Champions League semifinal, leading to a controversial elimination. The incident exemplifies growing concerns about VAR's expanding scope in football.
content: In what is possibly a world-first, VAR overturned a goal over a substitution -- and it led to a controversial Asian Champions League semifinal exit.

zh.title: '把足球变成废墟'：亚冠因VAR介入换人问题而陷入混乱

title: How Josh Sargent has inadvertently boosted one of the USMNT's World Cup rivals

content: In one of those amazing butterfly-effect moments, Josh Sargent's acrimonious exit from Norwich in January may have dealt a big blow to the USMNT's World Cup ambitions.

zh.title: 乔什·萨金特如何无意中增强了美国国家队的世界杯对手之一

title: From Premier League champions to relegation to League One

title: Wrexham co-owner Rob McElhenney offers Coventry trip before match

title: Leicester's 'horrible' journey ends with relegation

content: Leicester City have been relegated to League One from the Championship after a 2-2 draw with Hull City on Tuesday night.

title: Rosenior slams 'indefensible' Chelsea in latest loss

content: Chelsea's season slumped deeper into crisis after a 3-0 defeat to Brighton on Tuesday left its hopes of Champions League qualification hanging by a thread.

zh.title: 罗森纳在最新失利中抨击切尔西的'站不住脚'表现

title: Wrexham's Prem dream 'still alive' after vital win
summary: Wrexham manager Phil Parkinson said the club's Premier League ambitions remain alive after a vital victory returned them to the Championship playoff positions. The win keeps promotion within reach.
content: Wrexham manager Phil Parkinson said the club's Premier League dream is "still alive" after returning to the Championship playoff positions.

zh.title: 雷克瑟姆的英超梦在关键胜利后'仍然活着'
zh.summary: 雷克瑟姆主教练菲尔·帕金森表示，在一场关键胜利使球队重返英冠附加赛位置后，俱乐部的英超雄心仍然存在。这场胜利使升级仍有希望。

title: Vini turns 'whistles into applause' in Madrid win
summary: Vinicius Junior responded to fan criticism with a second-half goal in Real Madrid's 2-1 victory over Alavés. Coach Álvaro Arbeloa praised the forward for turning the whistles into applause with his decisive contribution.
content: Real Madrid coach Álvaro Arbeloa backed Vinicius Junior after the star forward was whistled by fans during the team's 2-1 win over Alavés on Tuesday, saying Vinícius had "turned the whistles into applause" with his second-half goal.

zh.title: 维尼在马德里胜利中将'嘘声转为掌声'

title: Crew owners get 18th NWSL team for record fee
summary: The NWSL awarded Columbus, Ohio its 18th franchise through a consortium led by the Haslam Sports Group, marking a record expansion fee. The new team will begin competition in 2028.
content: The NWSL awarded an expansion franchise to Columbus, Ohio, and an ownership consortium led by the Haslam Sports Group. The new Columbus-based team will begin play in 2028.

zh.title: 哥伦布船员队以创纪录费用成为NWSL第18支球队

title: Maradona's daughter confronts doctor in new trial
summary: One of Diego Maradona's daughters testified in the trial of seven medical professionals accused of negligence in the Argentine legend's 2020 death. The proceedings continue examining the circumstances surrounding his passing.
content: One of Diego Maradona's daughters testified on Tuesday in the new trial of seven medical professionals accused of negligence in her father's death in 2020.

zh.title: 马拉多纳女儿在新审判中对峙医生

title: Romania great Hagi returns to coach national team
summary: Romania legend Gheorghe Hagi has been appointed national team coach for the second time, taking over after Mircea Lucescu's recent death. The appointment marks Hagi's return to lead the national program.
content: Romania great Gheorghe Hagi has been hired as national team coach for the second time. He was appointed to replace Mircea Lucescu, who died two weeks ago.

zh.title: 罗马尼亚传奇哈吉回归执教国家队

title: FPL Podcast from BBC Sport
summary: BBC Sport's Fantasy Premier League podcast features hosts Alistair Bruce-Ball, Chris Sutton, and Statman Dave discussing the league with guest Steph Houghton. The episode covers current FPL strategy and player performance analysis.
content: Alistair Bruce-Ball, Chris Sutton and Statman Dave are joined by Steph Houghton.

zh.title: BBC体育的幻想英超联赛播客
